title: Try It Yourself
subtitle: Your personal AI experiment — start small, see results
description: You've learned how AI works, where it fails, and what to watch out for. Now it's time to actually use it. In 4 lessons, you'll pick your first AI experiment, try it for a week, figure out if it actually helped, and walk away knowing exactly what to do next. No tech background needed. No setup required. Just you, an AI tool, and something you want to get done.

lessons.title: Pick Your First AI Experiment
lessons.subtitle: Find something fun or useful — and just try it

lessons.title: Try It for a Week
lessons.subtitle: What to expect day by day — including the awkward parts

lessons.title: Did It Actually Help?
lessons.subtitle: A simple honest check — no spreadsheets required

lessons.title: What's Next (You're Officially AI-Literate)
lessons.subtitle: Celebrate what you've learned and figure out your next move
